articles.author: Steve Kopack
articles.title: Red hot AI demand pushes more companies into the $1 trillion club - NBC News
articles.description: Micron Technologies and SK Hynix joined the trillion-dollar club, which includes Apple, Meta and Tesla.
articles.content:
Artificial intelligence euphoria hit a new level this week, as two chipmakers hit $1 trillion in stock market value.
